# @a10n/blueprint-typespec

Custom TypeSpec library providing decorators for documenting a10n system components,
products, features, dependencies, evals, test suites, and database schemas.

## Known limitations

See [LIMITATIONS.md](./LIMITATIONS.md) for cases where custom decorators are kept because
no native TypeSpec equivalent exists.

## DB schema decorators

The `@ref`, `@unique`, and related DBML decorators are custom because TypeSpec does not yet
have a first-class relational schema layer.

Tracked upstream: https://github.com/microsoft/typespec/issues/10334
